summary: Seongbuk hosts Korea University — another university cluster gu. 김영배 and 김남근 won comfortably (55.68, 56.82). Academic, young-professional (Anam), and residential (Jeongneung, Wolgok) mix.

issues.label: University-cluster youth
issues.description: Korea University and Sungshin Women's populate younger progressive base.

issues.label: Mixed academic + residential
issues.description: Anam/Jeongneung mix of students and long-term residents.
